description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a low perimeter wall and featuring a spacious green lawn on two sides. The structure is rectangular, with large glass windows and sliding doors providing access to the garden and patio areas. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, complemented by wooden accents around the doors and windows. The layout includes multiple rooms, visible through the open roof, with a clear division between living spaces, bedrooms, and utility areas. A driveway leads to the front entrance, bordered by a landscaped section with a tree and shrubs. The backyard is expansive, offering ample outdoor space and privacy, with additional greenery and a small cluster of trees.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and spacious green lawns on both sides, enclosed by a low wall and featuring a driveway and landscaped garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, landscaped garden with a tree, and a clear view into the interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade, large windows, and the transition from the driveway to the backyard lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive backyard, additional trees, and the open layout of the living and bedroom areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the bungalow, the backyard, and the arrangement of rooms along the side wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
